chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Appl. No. S- 947 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 11.02.2026 For orders on office objections For hearing of main case M/s. Riaz Ahmed Panhwar & Inam Ali Khuhro, Advocate for Applicant Mr. Altaf Hussain Khokhar, A.P.G. Learned counsel at the outset said that Abdul Ghani co-accused who was accused of hitting Abdul Aziz on his shoulder with hatchet has been granted bail by this court on 29.5.2025. Learned counsel further states that applicant Ramzan allegedly hit Abdul Aziz on his hand with a lathi and thus his case is on better footings than that of Abdul Ghani. Learned D.P.G. says that he agrees with the learned counsel of the applicant but the distinguishing factor is that Abdul Ghani after he was granted bail has allegedly again attacked the complainant party. Be that as it may, Abdul Ghani breaching the condition of his bail would not mean that Ramzan is penalized for that. Accordingly Ramzan is admitted to post arrest bail against a surety of Rs. 1,00,000/- (One Hundred Thousand) and a PR bond for the same amount to the satisfaction of the learned trial court. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
